summary: Iteration 18 Testing COMPLETED: Mentor assignment using Member Types system fully implemented and working. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified - Mentor dropdown in admin Members form correctly populated from /api/admin/mentors endpoint showing only members with mentor-type assignment (Omar W, Sara WH).
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with admin@consultant.com / Admin123!
Backend: Wrong password correctly rejected with 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/member-types returns types with is_mentor field
Backend: 'Mentors' type has is_mentor=true in permissions
Backend: GET /api/admin/mentors returns members with mentor-type assignment
Backend: GET /api/admin/mentors excludes members with old is_mentor=true flag but no mentor type
Backend: GET /api/admin/mentors returns expected members (Omar W, Sara WH)
Backend: GET /api/member/available-mentors returns mentors for My Account
Backend: GET /api/member/available-mentors returns limited fields (no password_hash)
Backend: Saving member with mentor_membership_number from new mentor list works
Backend: /api/member/me returns _member_type with permissions including is_mentor
Frontend: Members Manager page loads at /admin/members
Frontend: Add Member dialog opens with Personal Info and Membership Info tabs
Frontend: Membership Info tab has Mentor dropdown
Frontend: Mentor dropdown populated from /api/admin/mentors (not local is_mentor filter)
Frontend: Mentor dropdown shows Omar W (AUX-8) and Sara WH (AUX-9) - members with Mentors type
seed_data_creation: Existing seeded data: Member type 'Mentors' (ID: 7a2be6f6-2406-4b97-b748-2ef44becc167) with is_mentor=true. Members Omar W (AUX-8) and Sara WH (AUX-9) assigned to Mentors type.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified: (1) GET /api/admin/mentors queries member_types for types with is_mentor=true, then returns members assigned to those types. (2) GET /api/member/available-mentors does the same but excludes current member and returns limited fields. (3) MembersManager.js calls adminAPI.getMentors() to populate mentor dropdown instead of filtering local items by is_mentor flag. (4) MentorshipProfile.js and MembershipProfile.js show mentor badge based on _member_type.permissions.is_mentor. (5) Two member types have is_mentor=true: 'Test Permissions Type' and 'Mentors'. (6) Two members (Omar W, Sara WH) are assigned the 'Mentors' type and appear in mentor dropdown.

new_endpoints.GET /api/admin/mentors: Returns members whose member_type has is_mentor=true
new_endpoints.GET /api/member/available-mentors: Returns mentors excluding current member for My Account
